mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_date, amount_total, customer_id, order_status_id, payment_method_id) VALUES (#{orderDate}, #{amountTotal}, #{customerId}, #{orderStatusId}, #{paymentMethodId})
INSERT INTO orders_detail (order_id, product_id, count) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{count})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_date, amount_total, customer_id, order_status_id, payment_method_id FROM orders WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY order_date DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, order_id, product_id, count FROM orders_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id
